subjects.heroSentence: This account placed a single $10K bet at roughly 11 percent on “Maduro out by January 31, 2026?” and cashed out about $88K. One bet is not statistically improbable on its own — but a lone, outsized, high-conviction long-shot like this, alongside the other signals, is the single-bet insider signature. Consistent with informed trading, not proof of it.

scorecard.formula: average of the market's odds at entry
scorecard.numbers: Average entry odds ~15% across 2 bets — concentrated in long shots (≤20%).

scorecard.formula: bets held to the end / total bets
scorecard.numbers: 2 of 2 positions held to resolution (100%) — sold <3% before the outcome; the conviction signature.

scorecard.formula: one large long-shot win held to resolution
scorecard.numbers: a single $10,000 bet at ~11% that paid ~$88,433 — a high-conviction long-shot concentrated on one outcome, the single-event insider signature (the binomial needs ≥5 independent events; this is the confluence path).
